text.title: microservices-design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team count exceed 2 independent squads working on different features?

conclusion.verdict: skip — modular monolith with bounded contexts is better
skip — invest in observability + on-call maturity first
scaffold per-service ownership + transports + circuit breakers
